description: Research program source document defining hypotheses, phases, metrics, gates, kill criteria, and recommended first experiment.
Reusable project loop prompt for future one-work-item Episteme research runs.
Rendered autonomous loop prompt with rehydrated LDGR context.
Exact prompt source/version/hash provenance for this loop run.

Phase 0 toy semantic retrieval run summary (compact): top_3_recall, candidate_set_reduction, false_elimination_rate, monotonic_narrowing_rate, shuffled-control comparison; outcome=supported with order/type inert + degenerate-shuffled caveats.
Phase 0 toy retrieval per-variant metrics, gate checks, order/type importance, shuffled per-seed, dataset.
Phase 0 incremental retrieval trajectories: candidate set after each evidence step per variant per target (shuffled=seed0).
Phase 0 human-readable comparison: metrics table, gate, honest caveats (order/type inert, degenerate shuffled), limitations.
Structured experiment result submission (result_summary, interpretation, limitations, confidence, decision) for phase0-toy-semantic-retrieval.
Basin-stability suite rerun after pair-7 generator bugfix: typed vs labelfree, inclusion 1.0, reduction 34x, drop-stability 0.0, corrupt-stability typed 0.69 / labelfree 0.29.
Two-stage + single-stage comparison after bugfix: two-stage recovers full typed disambiguation (1.0) with label-free storage.
Role-graph motif generator; includes pair-7 divergence-check fix in generate_prefix_shared_pairs.
Two-stage retrieval benchmark (topology coarse recall + typed payload unpack). After bugfix: disambiguation 1.0, fine reduction 34x.

Soft-scoring perturbation surface: drop/corrupt/noise survival by magnitude. drop transitions at mag 4 (was 0.0 under hard pruning), corrupt survives all tested, noise transitions at mag 2. First non-brittle basin result.

Soft scorer: matched structure + typed support - contradiction - missing penalty, with subsequence (not prefix) matching. Fixed dominant-family logic to compare at family level (same-family ties are confident, not ambiguous).
Perturbation surface mapper: drop/corrupt/noise across magnitudes, survival + score_gap + phase-transition detection.

Noise taxonomy surface (neutral/compatible/competing) v1 vs v2 scorer. v2 (separate penalties) did not beat v1; both collapse on neutral noise by mag 2-3. Decomposition reveals canonical-renumbering brittleness, not penalty weights.
v2 scorer with separate missing/extraneous/contradiction penalties. Necessary but insufficient -- exposes that the underlying canonical-trace representation is brittle to walk editing.
Noise taxonomy benchmark: neutral (foreign nodes), compatible (duplicated steps), competing (rival-family steps). v1 vs v2 comparison.
Four identity regimes (canonical/label/role_payload/bag_of_edges). role_payload (walk-local incident structure) measured WORSE than canonical on all edit types -- the branch premise was wrong.

Position-by-position edit-stability smoke. Shows canonical stable to insertion (9/9) and repeat-deletion (8/9), brittle only to first-occurrence deletion (4/9). role_payload brittle to all (0/9, 0/9, 4/9).
Matcher ablation implementation: greedy baseline, DP/LCS, bidirectional skip, bag-of-edges control over fixed canonical typed signatures.
Smoke showing greedy terminal failure after one inserted evidence node; DP/bidirectional recover.
Full matcher-ablation surface: drop/corrupt/noise + polysemy + bundle reduction for greedy/DP/bidirectional/bag.
Raw matcher-ablation results. Skip-capable alignment improves neutral-noise stability and preserves polysemy/bundle; bag-of-edges control loses polysemy.
Full two-stage basin surface rerun: greedy pre-fix vs DP/LCS default under label-free coarse basin -> typed payload architecture.
Raw full basin surface with DP/LCS default and greedy comparator: drop/corrupt/noise, polysemy, reduction.
Markdown report for DP/LCS full basin surface. Noise transition moves 2 -> 3, polysemy/reduction unchanged.
Updated findings with identity-branch correction, matcher ablation, and DP/LCS default full surface.
First-occurrence deletion control suite: canonical vs anchored_recurring vs edge_sequence vs bag_edges with DP/LCS fixed.
Raw deletion-control results. Confirms first-occurrence deletion brittleness; rejects anchored_recurring; edge/bag controls robust but lose discrimination.
Deletion-control report and boundary statement.
Updated findings with deletion-control boundary result.
Packaged architecture boundary: recurrence-sensitive basin retriever, DP/LCS noise repair, first-occurrence deletion as destructive perturbation boundary, next behavioral relevance test.

Behavioral relevance profile using LDGR historical findings as memory content; classifies interior identity-establishing deletion vs incomplete tail, measures survival/recovery under current DP/LCS architecture.
Raw behavioral relevance results over LDGR historical findings. Clean 1.0/32x; plausible modes survival 0.8884, first-rec deletion incidence 0.2634; controls survival 0.4479.
Behavioral relevance report for identity-establishing deletion on LDGR historical memory content.
Updated findings with LDGR historical-memory behavioral relevance result.

Packaged operating envelope/frozen substrate claim: label-free topology basin, typed/content payload projection, DP/LCS alignment, LDGR historical-memory validation, known destructive perturbation boundary.
Findings updated with phase package and frozen substrate claim.
